nasb.text: He who overcomes, and he who keeps My deeds until the end, to him I will give authority over the nations;

esv.text: The one who conquers and who keeps my works until the end, to him I will give authority over the nations,

cnv.text: 得勝的，又遵守我的旨意到底的， 我必把統治列國的權柄賜給他，

ccb.text: 至于那得胜又遵守我命令到底的人，我必赐给他统治列国的权柄，

csbs.text: 那得胜的，那把我的工作持守到底的，我将要赐给他权柄统管列国——
